'''âsh-y-ng''' ('''kashayang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coexhibit|coexhibit]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coexhibit|coexhibit]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashayang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishayang|thishayang]] || [[word:jishayang|jishayang]] || [[word:shishayang|shishayang]] || [[word:kishayang|kishayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushayang|thuthushayang]] || [[word:jujushayang|jujushayang]] || [[word:shushushayang|shushushayang]] || [[word:kukushayang|kukushayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushayang|thushayang]] || [[word:jushayang|jushayang]] || [[word:shushayang|shushayang]] || [[word:kushayang|kushayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushayang|thushayang]] || [[word:jushayang|jushayang]] || [[word:shushayang|shushayang]] || [[word:kushayang|kushayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshayang|theshayang]] || [[word:jeshayang|jeshayang]] || [[word:sheshayang|sheshayang]] || [[word:keshayang|keshayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshayang|thothoshayang]] || [[word:jojoshayang|jojoshayang]] || [[word:shoshoshayang|shoshoshayang]] || [[word:kokoshayang|kokoshayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshayang|thoshayang]] || [[word:joshayang|joshayang]] || [[word:shoshayang|shoshayang]] || [[word:koshayang|koshayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshayang|thoshayang]] || [[word:joshayang|joshayang]] || [[word:shoshayang|shoshayang]] || [[word:koshayang|koshayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshayang|thĂŠshayang]] || [[word:jĂŠshayang|jĂŠshayang]] || [[word:shĂŠshayang|shĂŠshayang]] || [[word:kĂŠshayang|kĂŠshayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashayang|thathashayang]] || [[word:jajashayang|jajashayang]] || [[word:shashashayang|shashashayang]] || [[word:kakashayang|kakashayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashayang|thashayang]] || [[word:jashayang|jashayang]] || [[word:shashayang|shashayang]] || [[word:kashayang|kashayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashayang|thashayang]] || [[word:jashayang|jashayang]] || [[word:shashayang|shashayang]] || [[word:kashayang|kashayang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashayang|shashayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashayang|goshashayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashayang|gokishashayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashayangnĂŒ|shashayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashayangnknĂŒ|goshashayangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayangnĂŒ|gokishashayangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashayangshĂ«|shashayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashayangnkshĂ«|goshashayangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashayangshĂ«|gokishashayangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayangro|shashayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayangnkro|goshashayangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayangro|gokishashayangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayangmu|shashayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayangnkmu|goshashayangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayangmu|gokishashayangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashayangsher|shashayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashayangnksher|goshashayangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashayangsher|gokishashayangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashayang|shashayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashayangnkng|goshashayangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashayang|gokishashayang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashayangya|shashayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashayangnkya|goshashayangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashayangya|gokishashayangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashayangyam|shashayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashayangnkyam|goshashayangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashayangyam|gokishashayangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayangnĂŒshĂ«|shashayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashayangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashayangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayangnĂŒro|shashayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayangnknĂŒro|goshashayangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayangnĂŒro|gokishashayangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayangnĂŒmu|shashayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayangnknĂŒmu|goshashayangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayangnĂŒmu|gokishashayangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayangshĂ«nĂŒ|shashayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashayangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashayangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayangshĂ«ro|shashayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayangnkshĂ«ro|goshashayangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayangshĂ«ro|gokishashayangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayangshĂ«mu|shashayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayangnkshĂ«mu|goshashayangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayangshĂ«mu|gokishashayangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayangronĂŒ|shashayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayangnkronĂŒ|goshashayangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayangronĂŒ|gokishashayangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayangroshĂ«|shashayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayangnkroshĂ«|goshashayangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayangroshĂ«|gokishashayangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayangromu|shashayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayangnkromu|goshashayangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayangromu|gokishashayangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayangmunĂŒ|shashayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayangnkmunĂŒ|goshashayangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayangmunĂŒ|gokishashayangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayangmushĂ«|shashayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayangnkmushĂ«|goshashayangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayangmushĂ«|gokishashayangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayangmuro|shashayangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayangnkmuro|goshashayangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayangmuro|gokishashayangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
